action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline achieved strong test PESQ=3.134 (val~2.86). predict.py and test_enhance.py are functional with offline loading and correct contract. Analysis: Pretrained model is task-specific; further gains possible via post-processing (loudness normalization to -23 LUFS using pyloudnorm, common in SE to stabilize levels for PESQ). Training new model (e.g. ConvTasNet) from scratch would likely underperform initially and require many iters/debug. Decision: Update test_enhance.py and predict.py to add pyloudnorm normalization after enhancement (handle clipping), re-run test to measure val PESQ improvement, then submit_eval on same checkpoint with updated predict.py for potential new best.
